nodes.speaker: Duan Yu
nodes.text: Hello, my friend! I'm Duan Yu of the Dali Duan family. You look travel-worn - have you come from afar?

nodes.speaker: Duan Yu
nodes.text: Though I don't care much for martial arts, I'm quite interested in music, Go, calligraphy, and painting. I've heard you meet friends through Go. Would you like to play a game with me?

nodes.speaker: Duan Yu
nodes.text: My family's 'Beiming Divine Art' is a martial arts masterpiece, and its inner-energy flow can also be excellently applied to Go.

options.text: Please teach me, Young Master Duan!
I want to learn the 'Beiming Divine Art'
Young Master Duan, I'd like to play another game with you

nodes.speaker: Duan Yu
nodes.text: Haha, you misunderstand, my friend. The 'Beiming Divine Art' I speak of is the art of cycling inner energy, letting you recover qi and dispel cooldowns in the game.

nodes.speaker: Duan Yu
nodes.text: The beauty of this technique is that you can restore inner energy at crucial moments and clear all skill cooldowns, letting the game flow again.

options.text: Miraculous! Please teach me, Young Master Duan

nodes.speaker: Duan Yu
nodes.text: Very well! Though I dislike conflict, I'm serious about Go. If you want to learn this technique, you must play a game with me first.

nodes.speaker: Duan Yu
nodes.text: My uncle, Master Yideng, often says, 'Go is like life - every move requires deep thought.' If you can beat me, it proves you have the understanding.

options.text: Alright! Please guide me, Young Master Duan!

nodes.speaker: Duan Yu
nodes.text: Then I won't hold back! Please!

nodes.speaker: Duan Yu
nodes.text: Excellent game! Your play is brilliant - free-spirited yet rigorous. In that case, I'll teach you the 'Beiming Divine Art'.

nodes.speaker: Duan Yu
nodes.text: The key to this technique is: restore your inner energy and clear all skill cooldowns at crucial moments. Use it sparingly.

nodes.speaker: Duan Yu
nodes.text: By the way, if you have the chance, visit my uncle at Dali's Tianlong Temple. His 'Solar Finger' mastery is truly unfathomable.

options.text: I'd like to hear more of your insights
I want to challenge you again

nodes.speaker: Duan Yu
nodes.text: Don't be discouraged, my friend. The path of Go is long - what matters is cultivating your mind. Practice more and you'll surely succeed.

nodes.speaker: Duan Yu
nodes.text: Though I'm the Crown Prince of Dali, what I love most is traveling and making friends. Go is also a way to make friends.

nodes.speaker: Duan Yu
nodes.text: Father often says I'm not attending to proper duties, but I think the most important thing in life is happiness. Don't you agree, my friend?

nodes.speaker: Duan Yu
nodes.text: No problem at all, come back when you're ready. I'll be in Dali, always welcoming you!

nodes.speaker: Duan Yu
nodes.text: Until we meet again, my friend! May you go far on the path of Go!
